+ Add Visit on …
A card will be created in the matching Bank of Targets sub-tab
Type a few letters → click a match to auto-fill the rest. OR use 📍 Pick from map to click a clinic visually.
The area (Frisco / Plano / McKinney / etc.) is auto-detected from this address.
No need to pick a member now — anyone can self-assign later
+ Add On-ground Marketing Member
What this does: The new member appears everywhere on the planner — schedule dropdowns, Team Overview cards, Status counters, Members tab, etc. They start with zero stats.
⚠ Don't forget step 2 — SharePoint access: After adding here, you MUST also add their email to the Marketing team M365 group on SharePoint (open site → top right → 6 members → Add members). Without that, the planner will let them sign in but their edits will silently fail to save for the team. The planner WILL detect this and show a big red banner if it happens.
This is the email they will use to "Sign in with Microsoft" — must match their M365 account exactly.
Default is "Marketing Agent" — change if different
Used for member-card headers and chips throughout the app

No canceled visits match the current filters.
💰 Finances
Visit spending log + 3-month business rankings (tier-based caps)
📅 Day →
How rankings work: each business has a patient-referral count that builds up during a 3-month period. At the end of the period the count snapshots into history and the tier for the NEXT period is locked in. Spending caps stay fixed for the entire current period.
🔒 Tier thresholds and spending caps can only be edited by an admin.
📦 Bulk export
End-of-month + end-of-quarter reports
Generates a set of CSV files you can open in Excel for record-keeping. Monthly covers visits, member stats, team stats, and spending for the chosen month. Quarterly covers patient-referral totals per business plus a team summary.
📅 Monthly bundle
4 files: visits · member_stats · team_stats · spending
📌 Quarterly bundle
2 files: referrals_by_clinic · quarterly_summary
Tip: open each CSV in Excel, then save-as .xlsx if you want formulas. Data is pulled live from the schedule, so the export reflects the current state at click time.
Monthly Progress Reports
Monthly progress reports — auto-updated from the schedule

Showing: my visits
# Date Area Visit Info Assigned Member 💰 Spending Status Rescheduled Date Business Leads Additional Notes
🗺️ Day Map
Today's visits · tap any pin to view card or add a visit
Show: Recency: 0–6d 7–13d 14–20d 21d+ (ripe) never
💡 At wide zoom: clinic city counts (e.g. "Frisco · 84"). Zoom in (scroll wheel) past city level to see individual clinic pins. MVAs + outreach with real addresses stay individual at all zooms.
Map will appear here once the library loads (a few seconds after sign-in).
🚗 Plan a route
Tell us where you're starting and where you want to end. The app will recommend clinics from the bank that lie along the way, so you maximize visits with minimum driving.
Color code: 0–6d 7–13d 14–20d 21d+ ripe never
Type to search, or tap 📍 Map to pick a pin on the map.
Leave the name blank for a round-trip back to Start. Or tap 📍 Map to pick on the map.
📥 Bulk import contact info
Paste a CSV (or TSV) with one row per business. Required column: Name. Optional columns: Phone, Fax, Website, Address. Header row required. Empty cells = leave field unchanged. Matching is fuzzy on the name (case + punctuation + suffix tolerant), so spreadsheet quirks usually still match.
📋 Patient Referral Log
Log every incoming patient referral · drives member & clinic counters automatically
👥 Per-member referral totals
Match Logged > reported Missing entries No data
📊 Log shift total
At end of shift, record the total patients you saw. Admins compare this against entries logged in the referral list to spot any missed patients.
⚠️ A total was already submitted for this shift. Submitting will overwrite it.
⚠️ Patient count doesn't match — quick question
Pick the closest reason so admin can see why the numbers don't line up.
🗺️ Map v2 — Google Maps + Gemini AI settings
Paste your two API keys here. Until both are set, Map v2 falls back to the existing Leaflet map + Haversine route math. Devmode (?devmode=1) forces fallback regardless of key state, so testing locally doesn't burn API calls.
🛡️ Daily safety caps
Hard JS limits. When hit, calls fail gracefully with no charge. Adjust as your free-tier comfort allows.
Map v2 master switch
Turn this off to force Leaflet/Haversine fallback site-wide, even with keys set.

Patient survey
Full record with referral source. Counts toward member & source stats.
👤 Patient details
📍 Source of referral
👇 First pick the marketing member who referred this patient (in the "Credit & logger" section below), then pick the business type and name here.
🏥 Destination
👥 Credit & logger
Front-desk emails are shared across shifts, so the system can't know which person logged the referral. Enter your name (and shift, if helpful) so admin can follow up with the right person if needed.

Actions taken by team members — logged when a member confirms a fully processed visit. Admin overrides live in the Administration Actions tab.

📊 Update Lead Status
Visit Outcome
Note
🏘 Outreach Engagement
This isn't a clinic — outreach events are people-collection. Tell us how many people you connected with, and how many shared their contact info for follow-up.
✎ Edit visit
Verify every field below. Each box already holds the value you saved earlier — review them in order, change only what needs to change, then click Confirm changes. If nothing actually changes, you'll get a "no changes made" notice and the visit stays as-is.
Visit context (locked)
A new "rescheduled" row will appear on this date.
Required for Completed visits. Use $0 if nothing was spent.
⚠ Confirming will OVERWRITE prior data. All side effects from this visit's previous confirmation (counters, lead state on the clinic card, rescheduled ghost row, etc.) will be reverted and replaced by the new values. There will be no trace of the old values.
❌ Cancel This Visit
Required. The reason will be displayed on the Canceled Visits sub-tab so the team knows why.

The date the announcement refers to (e.g. the meeting date itself).
📅 Display window — when to show on the dashboard
"Stop showing" defaults to the event date. Click the linked chip to override and pick any date.

🏥 Add Clinic
⚠️ AI-generated data needs verification. Gemini doesn't have live web access — it relies on training data and can hallucinate phone numbers or addresses. Always verify each field before saving.
🤖 Fields below were filled by Gemini. Review each one — phone numbers and addresses are common hallucination targets. Click Verified to clear the 🤖 badge once you've confirmed. The Add Clinic button is disabled until you verify every Gemini-filled field.
